hero.text: Products, open source projects, resources and standards built by the Hemia team to design and develop better digital experiences.

products.title: Tools to solve concrete problems for developers and teams.

ecosystem.title: Technology built inside a product and software ecosystem.
ecosystem.text: Hemia.dev is part of Hemia, a product, software and AI company that designs and develops digital solutions for organizations in Mexico and Latin America.

cta.title: Build with Hemia.
cta.text: Use our tools, explore the code, share feedback or contribute to the open projects.

openSourcePage.title: We build in the open.
openSourcePage.text: Libraries, components, templates and tools we use to build products inside the Hemia ecosystem. Open source with intent: every project with a purpose, license and maintainer.

standardsPage.title: How we build.
standardsPage.text: Standards and principles we use to make product, design and engineering decisions. They are not universal rules: they are criteria the team maintains and evolves.

resourcesPage.title: Start on a solid base.
resourcesPage.text: Templates, components, configurations and resources ready to adapt to your next project.

engineeringPage.title: Notes from the process.
engineeringPage.text: Decisions, problems and lessons from the team while we design, build and operate products. We publish from practice, not from trends.
